travelAgencies.description:
"PRIME BUS is a renowned brand in the bus operating industry. Our vision is to give a new face to the bus industry. Since our inception passenger comfort has been our top priority. We have frequently added luxury buses to our huge fleet of buses. The only thing we focus on is that the comfort quotient of our passengers should never be compromised. We have always tried our best to push our limits in order to develop our travel experience. Read further to understand what we offer that enhances our reputation in the market.

Live Bus Tracking

We have integrated this great technology of live bus tracking in almost all of our buses. This helps the passengers to be informed about the live position of the bus, thus helping them in planning their commute to the bus stand. It also prevents the unwanted stress of missing or waiting for the bus in case of delays.

Our Customer Support

To render the best service we strive to provide the best customer support. We have an attentive customer support team to which the passengers can report any issues regarding the journey. This team addresses all the issues of the passengers and comes out with a solution in the shortest possible time. This creates a warm feeling in the customers thus pushing them to be our regular customers.
Great Comfort

Now, once a passenger boards the bus he will be surprised by the inner comfort of the bus. The buses have all the latest amenities like WiFi, charging point, water bottle and central TV. The seats are really very comfortable and create a feeling of a cosy bedroom. We have almost all the luxury brand buses in our fleet. Our luxurious fleet includes Mercedes Benz Multi-axle buses, Volvo Multi-axle buses, and Scania Multi-axle comfort buses. These buses help in smoothening the journey. Our motto to change the perception of bus travel makes us enhance our luxury levels regularly.

Safety

Safety is one of the most important criteria we look for while planning a bus route. We have the best drivers who completely understand the importance of safety and follow all the safety rules.


Regular Offers

We at PRIME BUS strive to maintain the most reasonable rates in the market. This also makes our passengers happy and thus we further give them discount offers on a regular basis to enhance their happiness."

serviceDetails.title: New Delhi to Manali Luxury Cab

provider.about: PRIME BUS is a renowned brand in the bus operating industry. Our vision is to give a new face to the bus industry. Since our inception passenger comfort has been our top priority. We have frequently added luxury buses to our huge fleet of buses, also offering premium cab services for smaller groups. The only thing we focus on is that the comfort quotient of our passengers should never be compromised. We have always tried our best to push our limits in order to develop our travel experience. Our motto to change the perception of travel makes us enhance our luxury levels regularly. We offer live bus tracking, attentive customer support, and the best drivers who completely understand the importance of safety and follow all safety rules. We strive to maintain the most reasonable rates in the market and provide regular discount offers.

route.bestTimeToTravel: Early morning (5 AM) to avoid traffic and enjoy mountain views

discounts.regularOffers: We at PRIME BUS strive to maintain the most reasonable rates in the market and provide discount offers on a regular basis.

serviceHighlights: Doorstep pickup from any location in Delhi NCR
Professional, uniformed driver with 12+ years experience in hilly terrain
Flexible payment options (PayTM, Card, Cash, UPI)
Free cancellation up to 24 hours before trip
Trip insurance included (up to ₹7 lakhs cover)
serviceDetails.description: Experience royal comfort with our New Delhi to Manali luxury cab service. Travel in style with our Mercedes-Benz multi-axle or luxury SUV, featuring leather interiors, ambient lighting, and entertainment system. Our professional driver, experienced in mountain roads, ensures a smooth journey on the Delhi-Manali Highway with planned breaks at scenic locations. Perfect for families, couples, and tourists who value comfort and safety. The 12-14 hour journey includes optional sightseeing stops at Chandigarh and Kullu. We provide complimentary WiFi, mineral water, and snacks to make your journey enjoyable. Our cabs are sanitized before every trip and drivers follow strict safety protocols. Whether you're heading to Manali for a vacation, honeymoon, or adventure trip, our luxury cab service ensures you reach refreshed and relaxed. We have integrated great technology of live tracking to keep you informed about the live position of the vehicle, helping you plan your commute and preventing unwanted stress. Book now and experience the difference premium travel makes!
serviceDetails.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before scheduled pickup. 50% refund if cancelled between 24 hours and 6 hours. No refund for cancellations within 6 hours of pickup or no-show. In case of cab breakdown, we provide alternative cab within 60 minutes or full refund. Bad weather cancellations are fully refundable. To cancel, call our 24/7 support or use the app.
paymentOptions: EMI options available for bookings above ₹10000

bookingInfo.peakSeasonSurcharge: May-Jul, Dec-Jan: 20% extra for weekend bookings

reviews.comment: Best travel experience to Manali! Car was spotless and driver was very professional, handled mountain roads perfectly.
Luxury experience at affordable price. Loved the WiFi and snacks! The live tracking feature was very useful.
Driver was very knowledgeable about Manali. Showed us good places along the way and gave great tips.

serviceDetails.seasonalOffers: Summer special: 10% off on bookings before June. Monsoon discount: 5% off on bookings during July-August.
